titleStmt.title: SII 26.700: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 700. (A.R. No. 653 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Kulōttuṅgachōḷadēva I: Year 47, Dhanus (Mārgaḻi) śu. 1, Monday, Mūlam = 1117 A.D., November 26.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places. It contains the praśasti of the king beginning with ••••• puviyil poṉṉēmi-yaḷavil, etc.

It records a sale of land to the temple of Śrī Kayilāsamuḍaiyār of Tirunalam, a Brahmadēśam, in Veṇṇāḍu, by the Peruṁguṟi mahāsabhai of Pāvaikkuḍi alias Nittavinōdachcharuppēdi-maṅgalam, a Brahmadēśam in Veṇṇāḍu in Uyyakkoṇḍa-vaḷanāḍu, who had assembled in the temple of Tirumēṟkōyilāḻvār of the place. The land was of the extent of 1/2 nilam or 10 mā and each mā of land is stated to be of 100 kuḻi in area. The price was 11 Aṉṟāḍu Naṟkāśu. It is further recorded that the dēvakaṉmis of the temple should cultivate the lands and use the yields to perform worship and to provide offerings to the god of the temple. The land is stated to have been made tax-free. Representatives of the sabhai and of the temple priests figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . puviyil poṉṉemiyaḷavun taṉṉemi naṭātti viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkarakoṭṭattu vik
mattoḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntavaṉ kaḷiṟṟiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayal muṉaikkontaḷavaraicar tantanamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittu toḷvali kāṭṭi porpala
naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticaivākaicūṭit teṉticai temarukamalappūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭaiyum nannilappāvaiyut tavirttu punitiru tirumaṇimakuṭam Urimaiyil cūṭitannaṭi Iraṇṭun taṭamuṭiyāt tonnilaventar cūṭap muṉṉai manuvāṟu peru
kka kaliyāṟu vaṟuppa ceṅkol ticai toṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Irunila viḷākameṇkanuntaṉatu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Orutaṉimeruviṟ puli viḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟṟivāntarattu pūpālar tiṟaiviṭutta kalañcori kaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tennavan karuntalaiparuntalaittiṭat taṉṉakarpuṟa
ṭaikkiṭappavināḷ piṟkulappiṟaipol niṟpiḻaiyennum colletir koṭiṟṟallatu taṉkai villetir koṭāvikkalanakalakar naṅkili tuṭa maṇalūr naṭuveṉat tu pattiṟai veṇkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟuviṭṭa tanmānamum kūṟiya viramum kiṭappa Eṟiṉa malaikaḷu mu
tuku neḷippa yiḻinta netikaḷuñ cuḻaṉṟuṭaintoṭa viḻunta kaṭalkaḷun talaivari talamarakkuṭaticaittannāḷukantu tāṉum tānaiyum pannāḷiṭṭa palapalamutukum payantetir māṟiṉa jayapperuntiruvum paḻiyukantu pukaḻiñcelviyum vāḷāroṉ kaṇmaṭantaiyariṭṭamum miḷāḷatu kuṭutta veṅkariniraiyuṅ kaṅka
maṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇamennum pāṇiyiraṇṭum Oruvicaikkaikkoṇṭiṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭimaṇṭalamuṅkoḷḷat tiruuḷḷattaṭai poruparittaḷaṅkaḷum polat tantiravāriyumuṭaittāyvantu vaṭakaṭal teṉkaṭal paṭarvatu polattaṉ peruñceṉaiyai ye
vippañcavar Aiyvvarum porutaporkaḷattañci Araṇenappukkakāṭaṟattuṭaittu toṭaviḻunta kaṭalkaḷun talaiviritalamāka kuṭaticait tannāḷukantu tāṉum tānaiyum pannāḷiṭṭa palapalamutukum payantetir māṟiya jayapperuntiruvum paḻiyu
kantu kuṭutta miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niraiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇamennum pāṇiyiraṇṭum Oru vicaik kaikkoṇṭiṇ ṭu pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅkoḷḷat tiru
nāṭṭaṭippa
rutu maṟṟavar tammai vaṇacākara ṅ � ṟṟava jayajayasthampanticai toṟun tta muttin
calāpamu muttamiṭ potiyaluṅ kanniyuṅ
ruḷit teṉnāṭṭellai kāṭṭik kuṭal malaināṭṭuḷ cāveṟellān tanvatam peṟa māveṟiya tanvaruttaṟ talaivark kuṟukalar kulayak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟkaḷatoṟum nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷittiṟai koḷa virasiṅhāsanat taruḷap poṅko U puyar talaṅkaḷum polappāto kaccivaṉiṭattumaiyeṉat tiyākavalli Ulakuṭaiyāḷiruppa Avaṉuṭaṉ kaṅkai viṟṟiruntana maṅkaiyar tilatam Eḻicaivallapi Ēḻulakamuṭaiyāḷuṭaṉ vāḻimalarntinitiruppa Ūḻiyun tirumālākattu
tirumakaḷaruntan tiyākavalli Ulakuṭaiyāḷoṭum maṉni virasiṅhāsaṉattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecarivarmmarāṉa tribhuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulot tuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 7 Āvatu dhanurnāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu piratamaiyum tiṅkaḷ
kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mulattu nāḷ Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu brahmadecam pāvaikkuṭiyāṉa nittavinotaccaruppetimaṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom Innāḷāl Eṅkaḷurt tirumeṟkoyilāḻvār koyilile kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu paṇippaṇiyāl
innāṭṭu brahmadecam tirunalattu śrīkaiyilāsamuṭaiya mahādevar devar kanmikaḷukku nāṅkaḷ sabhai vilaiyāka viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatum Ivvūr śrīmaturāntakavatikku meṟku śrīcoḻakeraḷavāykkālukku vaṭakku Añcāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu sabhaip potuvāy
nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattukkuk kiḻpāṟkellai sabhaip potuvāykkiṭanta nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai pāratakavā kkatavan mātavapaṭṭa nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai tiripuvanamātevivatikkum meṟpaṭiyā nilattukkum
kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai perunāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvu paṭṭa nilam tiruvulāntapaṭṭa nūṟukuḻi koṇṭa toru māvāka vanta nilam ¬ Innilam Araiyum viṟṟukkuṭuttom Ittevarkanmi
kaḷukku Im mahāsabhaiyom Ittevarkkum Innilam viṟṟukkuṭuttuk k[oḷ-] vatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 1 Ikkācu Oṉṟum Itdevar paṇṭārattile koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom Im mahāsabhaiyom Innilattil menokkiya maraṅkaḷuṅ kiṇo
kkiya kiṇaṟum melaikkācinākan kuḷattile Iṟaikkap peṟuvārkaḷākavum Ipparicu Ikkācu Oṉṟum Aṟakkoṇṭu vi vip poruḷaṟak koṇṭu sabhai vilai pramāṇam Emakku kuṭuttom Ittevar kanmikaḷukku Imamahāsabhaiyom Isabhai Uḷḷiruntu viripuṟattu śrītevikkiramavittanār pa
ṇiyālum bhāradavāja tirivikkiraman tirukaccuvanār paṇiyālum pārattuvāja marutamāṇikkam vaṭukanātanār paṇiyālum pārattuvāja tirukatavan tirukaṇapuramuṭaiyār paṇiyālum Ippaṭi Ivar kallilum cempilum tirunalamuṭaiyār koyil tirukkaṟṟaḷiyile kalveṭṭivittukkoḷḷap peṟuvārkaḷākavum Ivarkaḷ paṇippaṇiyā
l Ivvūr karaṇattān kāṭṭu Uṭaiyān vaṭukanātan veṇṇaikkūttanen ṉavānneḻuttu Ippaṭikku pārattuvāji tirukkatavan mātavapaṭṭanen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭikku pārattuvāja marutamāṇikkam vaṭukanātanen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivvūr kaṇakkan teṅkañceri Uṭaiyān Ātittan kaṇṇāḷanen Ivai
eḻuttu Ippaṭikku pārattuvāji vaṭukanātan tillaināyakanen Ivai En Eḻuttu ...§ Ippaṭikku pārattuvāji vaṭukanātan śrīkraṣṇan sayiñaiyātanamaikku Ivai kāṭṭuruṭaiyān vaṭukanātan Ivaṉ kūttanen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivvūr tirumeṟkoyil gamutaman Ulakamuṇṭānen Ivai Enneḻuttu
ippaṭikku Ivvūr civabrāhma(ā)ṇan pāratāyan puṟampiyanen Ivai Enneḻuttu § . Ippaṭikku Itu pāratuvāji tirukkatavan tirukkaṇṭāmuṭaiyān sayijaiyātanamaikku Ivai kāṭṭuruṭaiyāneḻuttu Ippaṭikku virippuṟattu śrī- devikkiramavitta neḻuttu Ippaṭikku viripuṟattu śrīīśabhaṭṭaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku
pārattuvāji tiruvikkiraman tirukaccuvaneḻuttu Itu cempiyan Aḷanāṭṭu veḷāṉ samiñaiyātanamaikku Ivvūr kāttān teṅkuñceri Uṭaiyār Ātittaṉ kaṇṇāḷaneḻuttu Itu tirucciṟṟampala Aḷanāṭṭu veḷān samiñaiyātanamaikkum Itu pārattuvāji tiruvikkiraman śrīkraṣṇanār sayiñaiyātanamaikku Ivai kā
kku Ivai niṭur kiḻavaneḻuttu . § Ippaṭi vilaikoṇṭu Ittevarkku somamāy Irunta Innilam Ittevarkku yāṇṭu 4 10 7 nāḷāl In nittavinotaccaruppetimaṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom Eṅkaḷūrt tirumeṟkoyilāḻvāṉ koyilile kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟakkūṭi Iruntu paṇipaṇiyāl Innāṭṭu brahmate
ṭaiyār taruḷi Irukkum Ātiśaṇṭeśvaradevar paṇṭārattu Itdevarkanmikaḷ pakkal Itdevar pa �cu 10 1 Ikkācu patinoṉṟuṅ koṇṭu Ikkācil palicaikkuñ Ittevar Arjaṉai Uḷḷiṭṭa pūjaikaḷukku Uṭalāka nāṅkaḷ vaitta [5 10 1] Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭaru Eṅkaḷūr śrīmaturāntakavatikku meṟku
picā kku vaṭakku rūpāy kkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟcatirattu Eṅkaḷ pakkal vilai koṇṭa rūpāy (1/2) Innilam Araiyum Ittevarkanmikaḷ payir ceytu Itdevar Arjaṉai Uḷ ku Uṭalākak koḷḷap peruvari cilvari ḷāṇam U velikkācu maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭavu Incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.700 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
